name: Cheese Truffles
recipeIngredient: 250 grams Imperial cold pack cheddar cheese (Maclaren's)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast almonds and chop them very fine.
2. Blend all ingredients in a food processor on pulse until smooth.
3. Remove from the processor.
4. Work quickly to shape into 1-inch balls.
5. Chill for at least 3 hours.
6. Just before serving, roll each ball in chopped almonds to coat.
7. Makes about 60 truffles. Origin: Adapted from What's Cooking, 14th issue.
